training.loss_notes: default CrossEntropyLoss over flattened target-gene classes

artifact_usage_claims.usage: preserves official DEG target order/count and fixed split; model validates target count before training

pipeline_program.representation: official K562 AIDO+GNN cached features inherited from parent lineage
pipeline_program.target_side: official target genes with learned low-rank factor matrix
pipeline_program.fusion: hybrid direct classifier plus target-factorized classifier
pipeline_program.head: rank-128 target low-rank DEG head with learned direct/low-rank mixture
pipeline_program.paper_alignment: planned target low-rank classifier over all 6,640 official targets; no compact/proxy/fallback
